title: Lights
description:
A datapack that makes it possible to craft light blocks.
With these you can light up your buildings better than with torches.
body:
# Lights
No further updates

[![](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/ihmfvkoN?color=00AF5C&label=downloads&logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/lights) [![](https://cf.way2muchnoise.eu/full_1048164_downloads.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/lights-datapack)
![](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/ihmfvkoN)
## About
With lights you can illuminate your buildings without using annoying flare.
The light blocks are easy to craft from 8 glass panes and a torch.

### Info
This datapack is fully compatible with vanilla minecraft and only adds a crafting recipe for light blocks.


![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/acd20a883893343492269e3f51d02c7d6772df2b.png)


## Thanks for 5k downloads!
